nodes.label: TS Tournament #3975983059 ($0.46+$0.04) 2nd place Power Path Ticket
nodes.norm_label: ts tournament #3975983059 ($0.46+$0.04) 2nd place power path ticket

nodes.label: Leak Confidence Computation
nodes.rationale: Added sample-size thresholds (Low < 30 hands preflop, < 10 opportunities postflop/3-bet) to distinguish actionable leaks from noise.

nodes.label: Branding Neutralization
nodes.rationale: Purged 'Reg Life' and 'Plano de Jogo' references from strategy/ranges files to remove third-party brand mentions and preserve private/local generic analyzer posture.

nodes.label: Parser Confidence Ledger
nodes.rationale: Turns retained local import diagnostics into an explicit ledger (ready/directional/blocked posture) that downstream analysis and support exports can trust.

nodes.label: Drift-free Cents Accumulation
nodes.rationale: Implemented integer cents space for player actions, blind postings, pot collection, and stack deltas to eliminate floating-point precision loss.

nodes.label: Progressive Knockout Detection
nodes.rationale: PKO flag preserved at tournament category level; bounties tracked at hand level to avoid double-counting.

nodes.label: Custom Range Validation
nodes.rationale: RFI and push fold validators load user-edited custom ranges from localStorage for immediate scoring updates.

nodes.label: ImportConfidenceLedger
nodes.rationale: Aggregates ready/directional/blocked posture, latest confidence, parsed-file rate, saved record totals, run counts, and grouped parser warning categories so diagnostics explain why analysis should be trusted or reviewed.

nodes.label: Privacy Boundary Check Script
nodes.rationale: Static guard preventing accidental network APIs, remote assets, native share APIs, and blocked SDK dependencies to enforce local-first privacy posture.

nodes.label: Local Privacy Guard
nodes.rationale: Turns private/local research finding into an enforceable runtime privacy boundary without blocking future explicit opt-in product decisions.

nodes.label: Evidence Citation Trust Badges
nodes.rationale: Connects canonical evidence to visible leak/study UI so study queue cards distinguish cited rule/proxy/reference items from unsupported BB-loss review items.

nodes.label: Kernel Contract Repair
nodes.rationale: Strengthened existing agent kernel (effective task scope, protocol/generated/freshness fields, evidence preflight, protocol-size remediation) instead of replacing it after comparing external workflow repos.

nodes.label: Third-party Curriculum Mention Purge
nodes.rationale: Removed explicit third-party brand mentions from repo docs while preserving private/local generic analyzer posture.

nodes.label: Automatic Local Import Diagnostics
nodes.rationale: Every completed import saves an explicit local-only diagnostics snapshot with sanitized basenames, capped warnings, aggregate counts; retention bounded to 50 runs; no telemetry.

nodes.label: Import Diagnostics Export
nodes.rationale: Privacy-conscious Markdown export for parser/import failure observability that excludes raw hand histories and hole cards.

nodes.label: Recommendation Trust Labels
nodes.rationale: Adds explicit 'rule-based no EV', 'directional only', 'reference check', 'review only' labels so rule-based recommendations do not read as solver-backed advice.

nodes.label: HandsPage Hand-category Test Extraction
nodes.rationale: Moves self-executing test assertions from production page source into a real Vitest file to avoid test logic in runtime code.

nodes.label: Exact poker-odds-calculator Dependency Pin
nodes.rationale: Pins pre-1.0 poker-odds-calculator exactly to prevent install drift changing HandReplay equity behavior through minor releases.

nodes.label: Bounty and Final-table Context Surfacing
nodes.rationale: Closes docs/UI mismatch where bounty and FT analyzers attached metadata but HandReplay only surfaced ICM and squeeze cues.

nodes.label: HandReplay Postflop Consistency
nodes.rationale: Prefers stored import-time HeroDecision.postflopActions and falls back to recomputation only for older decisions to prevent pot-basis drift between import and replay.

nodes.label: Per-decision ICM Compliance Stage
nodes.rationale: Fixes Advanced-profile range compliance recomputation so per-hand ICM stage (bubble/ITM/final-table) is consumed rather than always defaulting to early game.

nodes.label: Test Runner Isolation and Test Typecheck
nodes.rationale: Runs Vitest in isolated default worker mode; adds typecheck:test gate and V8 coverage with 70% line threshold for runtime source files.
nodes.norm_label: test runner isolation and test typecheck

nodes.label: Advanced Analyzer Import Pipeline Wiring
nodes.rationale: Connects existing bountyAnalyzer and finalTableAnalyzer outputs to HeroDecision records created by buildHeroDecision so metadata is attached before persistence.

nodes.label: Villain Stats Position Records Fix
nodes.rationale: Replaces IndexedDB-hostile Map storage with plain Partial<Record<Position,PositionStats>> and persists raw villain counters for correct VPIP/PFR/3-bet denominators across incremental imports.

nodes.label: Facing-raise Reaction Ranges Fix
nodes.rationale: Replaces heuristic facing-raise lookup with explicit hero/opener reaction range map; stops SB from falling through to loose late-position behavior; unsupported pairs return undefined instead of borrowing unrelated fallback.

nodes.label: Range Compliance MP and Reaction Cleanup
nodes.rationale: 7/8-max MP hands now checked against conservative MP1 baseline; unsupported hero/opener pairs skipped rather than defaulting to LP-vs-EP.
nodes.norm_label: range compliance mp and reaction cleanup

nodes.label: C-bet Opportunity and Missed-cbet Fixes
nodes.rationale: Prevents false c-bet opportunities when villain leads before hero; prevents postflop missed-cbet spots after hero folded preflop; replaces hardcoded pot sizing with computed preflop pot.

nodes.label: OHH Large JSON and Upload Worker Cleanup
nodes.rationale: Checks full JSON content for OHH before truncated text signature scan; terminates superseded/unmounted parser workers; guards stale async completions with import sequence guard.
nodes.norm_label: ohh large json and upload worker cleanup

nodes.label: Standalone Sandbox v4 Visual Novelty Upgrades
nodes.norm_label: standalone sandbox v4 visual novelty upgrades

nodes.label: getHandCategory Suited Gapper Broadway Fallthrough Fix
nodes.rationale: Non-broadway non-ace non-connector suited hands (e.g. K5s, 86s) were mislabeled as 'broadway'; mapped to new 'suited-gappers' category.
nodes.norm_label: gethandcategory suited gapper broadway fallthrough fix
